Bash(claude --print "Search the web for the latest information \(2025-2026\) about cost management for AI agents in production. I need specifics on: token budgets, model selection per step \(using cheap models for routing, expensive for reasoning\), Anthropic prompt caching pricing and savings, OpenAI prompt caching, and real-world cost optimization strategies teams use. Give me concrete numbers and techniques.")

Bash(claude --print "Search the web for the latest information \(2025-2026\) about AI agent security in production - specifically prompt injection defense techniques in 2025-2026, tool access control patterns, data sanitization for agent outputs, and any frameworks or standards that have emerged. Also search for agent observability - what metrics and dashboards teams track for production AI agents, tracing tools like LangSmith, Braintrust, Arize Phoenix, etc.")

Bash(claude --print "Search the web for the latest information \(2025-2026\) about: 1\) Scaling AI agents - serverless vs long-running workers, task queues for agent workloads, deployment patterns \(Lambda, Cloud Run, background workers, webhook-driven agents\). 2\) Latency optimization for agents - parallel tool calls, streaming responses, async execution. 3\) Rate limiting and API management for multi-agent systems. 4\) Real-world production failure stories and lessons learned when deploying AI agents. Give concrete examples and practical advice.")
